title: BSNL Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: BSNL Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
BSNL Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BSNL Advisory Limited:
BSNL Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL Advisory Limited!
